response.overview: Chase McDozer is back in an all new adventure. As we saw in the ending of 'The Most Dangerous Spy', Cueball and Crazy Eights have teamed up. As if that wasn't enough, a new enemy arises: Indigo. He proves to be the biggest threat McDozers ever faced. There'll be many twists, turns, and surprises along the way. The question remains, is it all too much for Chase?
response.title: Chase McDozer in Code Indigo
